meta.title: LBTA Revenue Risk Register Premortem
scope: Marketing attribution and local listing integrity

canonicalPolicies.enrollmentRule: Spot is confirmed only after City Rec1 payment.
secondaryFacilities: 380 Third St (City registration office context only)

knownFriction: Lead submitted but City payment not completed
Parent confusion between trial/app and payment confirmation

riskRegister.failureMode: Lead/trial submitted but City payment never completed
leadingIndicators: pending_city_payment leads older than 24h
high trial volume with flat city_paid count
recoveryPlaybook: call parent with exact Rec1 listing name
send direct payment link + class details

riskRegister.failureMode: Parent believes trial/app signup already reserved spot
leadingIndicators: support messages with 'I already signed up' and no payment
repeat confusion questions in chat logs
preventiveControls: explicit payment warning in confirmation flows

riskRegister.failureMode: Parent pays wrong City listing/session
leadingIndicators: post-payment correction requests
class mismatch reports
preventiveControls: send exact Rec1 listing text in follow-ups

riskRegister.failureMode: Website schedules and City listings out of sync
leadingIndicators: city sku missing for live website class
frequent support corrections

riskRegister.failureMode: No reliable source/campaign attribution to paid enrollment
leadingIndicators: cannot produce lead-to-paid report by source
high '(not set)' or unknown source rows

riskRegister.failureMode: Leads stuck without explicit payment status
leadingIndicators: stale leads >3 days in generic stage
no owner assigned to pending payment leads

riskRegister.failureMode: Slow first response to high-intent leads
leadingIndicators: median first response >4 business hours

riskRegister.failureMode: Bot, staff, and coaches give conflicting instructions
leadingIndicators: chat QA findings with conflicting language
repeat payment confusion tickets
preventiveControls: single source script for payment statements

riskRegister.failureMode: UTM inconsistency prevents clean attribution
leadingIndicators: GA4 source '(not set)' spike
campaign links missing medium/source

riskRegister.failureMode: Mixed Android app links reduce trust and conversion
leadingIndicators: multiple package IDs in active templates

riskRegister.failureMode: Trial attended but no same-day conversion follow-up
leadingIndicators: trial attendance with no next action after 12h
preventiveControls: coach trigger to desk at session end

riskRegister.failureMode: No-show trials are not recovered
leadingIndicators: no-show with no contact within 24h

riskRegister.failureMode: Campaign drives demand for classes already full in City
leadingIndicators: post-send increase in full class complaints

riskRegister.failureMode: Slow pages increase conversion abandonment
leadingIndicators: LCP over target on key pages
drop in mobile form completion rate

riskRegister.failureMode: Contrast/readability issues reduce completions
leadingIndicators: a11y audit serious findings remain on conversion surfaces
recoveryPlaybook: hotfix text styles for key CTAs and form labels

riskRegister.failureMode: NAP inconsistency across GBP/Yelp/Apple/Bing
leadingIndicators: listing audit finds phone/address variance
preventiveControls: monthly citation audit against canonical NAP
recoveryPlaybook: correct listing data and track completion

riskRegister.failureMode: Ranking claims made without GSC/GBP evidence
leadingIndicators: no weekly query and local insight reports
recoveryPlaybook: pause claims until evidence is available

riskRegister.failureMode: Stringing requests captured without formal ticketing
leadingIndicators: requests in inbox with no assigned owner or SLA
preventiveControls: single intake workflow with required fields

riskRegister.failureMode: Same-day promise exceeds capacity and harms trust
leadingIndicators: accepted same-day requests after cut-off
late pickup complaints
preventiveControls: capacity and cut-off guardrails in intake copy
recoveryPlaybook: expectation reset and priority slot options

riskRegister.failureMode: ActiveCampaign to GHL migration creates nurture gaps
leadingIndicators: new leads absent from expected nurture path
automation parity checklist incomplete
preventiveControls: dual-run and parity QA before cutover

week1: Implement pipeline stages including pending_city_payment and city_paid
week2: Enforce UTM naming and link template policy
Create daily City export reconciliation process
Unify Android app link across active website/templates
week3: Run local listing audit across GBP/Yelp/Apple/Bing
Establish weekly GSC and GBP evidence report
week4: Publish monthly risk review with incidents, SLA misses, and leak reasons
Reprioritize top mitigation work based on measured leakage
